channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Ransomware Trends for 2025: Top Predictions and Strategies to Mitigate Risks
item.description: Zscaler ThreatLabz research team reveals critical insights on ransomware trends for 2025, including AI-powered social engineering attacks, trifecta of social engineering attacks, targeted industries under siege, new SEC regulations driving increased transparency, and ransomware payouts on the rise.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia’s CES surprise gets spoiled as RTX 5090 accidentally leaked - and it’s a monster
item.description: We're just hours away from an official RTX 5090 reveal, but we've just had our first look thanks to an Inno3D leak.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Artificial intelligence tech firm will expand in San Jose with new HQ
item.description: An artificial intelligence and tech company will move its headquarters to north San Jose in an expansion.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Top tech trends powering the Middle East’s digital evolution by 2025
item.description: Q. Looking ahead to 2025, what do you see as the key technology trends that will shape the Middle East’s digital landscape? A. By 2025, several key technology trends will shape the Middle East’s digital landscape.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: China protests US sanctions for its alleged role in hacking, complains of foreign hacker attacks
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has slammed a decision by the U.S. Treasury to sanction a Beijing-based cybersecurity company for its alleged role in multiple hacking incidents targeting critical U.S. infrastructure, while the Chinese cyber security agency complained Monday of attacks on Chinese networks.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: China protests US sanctions for its alleged role in hacking, complains of foreign hacker attacks
item.description: China has slammed a decision by the U.S. Treasury to sanction a Beijing-based cybersecurity company for its alleged role in multiple hacking incidents targeting critical U.S. infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Elaine Kurtenbach, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Malicious apps posing as VPNs can turn your device into a tool for cyberattacks
item.description: Not all apps out there offer legit virtual private networks, according to Kurt the CyberGuy. He explains how to keep your information safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple’s Siri settlement feeds the ‘eavesdropping iPhone’ narrative
item.description: Apple, which has built its brand on data privacy, settled a class action suit this week in which the plaintiffs claimed their iPhones’ Siri voice assistant listened in on their conversations for the purpose of targeting them with ads.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: 16 fascinating breakthroughs of 2024 that weren’t about AI
item.description: All the excitement around artificial intelligence can make it hard to notice all the other exciting progress lately that’s been the result of human intelligence. Of course, it’s getting harder to say what’s not got some bit of AI or deep learning in it.
item.dc:creator: Alex Pasternack, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk turns Cybertruck explosion into a marketing moment
item.description: The new year started out with the worst kind of bang. In the early hours of January 1, an assailant exploded a Cybertruck in front of Trump Hotel in Las Vegas, using firework mortars and gas canisters.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Police took over a week to name the NYC subway burning victim. A fake name spread in the meantime
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It took police more than a week to publicly identify Debrina Kawam, 57, as the woman who was fatally set on fire in a New York subway train last month. But on the internet, it took just hours for a false name to begin spreading.
item.dc:creator: MELISSA GOLDIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What to know about Apple's $95 million settlement of the snooping Siri case
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit that accused the company of turning its virtual assistant Siri into a snoop that eavesdropped on the users of iPhones and other trendy devices in a betrayal to its long-standing commitment to personal privacy.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Chinese cyber firm linked to botnet attack sanctioned in US
item.description: The federal government hit Chinese cyber group Integrity Technology Group with new sanctions on Friday, citing alleged computer intrusion incidents against those in the U.S. At the direction of the China, hackers associated with the Integrity Technology Group allegedly targeted multiple U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Write Python like it’s 2025
item.description: It’s a new year, and we feel fine! 2024 was a breakout year for our favorite programming language, and we have a feeling 2025 will be even bigger.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple to pay $95 million to settle lawsuit accusing Siri of eavesdropping
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit accusing the privacy-minded company of deploying its virtual assistant Siri to eavesdrop on people using its iPhone and other trendy devices.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 44 awesome Android app discoveries from 2024
item.description: It’s the calm before the storm. Today, on New Year’s Day, we have a brief moment to pause and prepare — and set ourselves up for success. From a tech perspective, that means taking the time to clean up and optimize your smartphone setup.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intro to VSCode.dev: The IDE in your browser
item.description: The fully realized browser-based IDE has been a long time coming. Ever since the beginning of the cloud revolution, I’ve thought a powerful and flexible remote IDE was just around the corner. I imagined a development tool that could use any virtual machine as a development platform.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rhode Islanders' data was leaked from a cyberattack on state health benefits website
item.description: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (AP) — Cybercriminals who hacked Rhode Island’s system for health and benefits programs have released files to a site on the dark web, a scenario the state has been preparing for, Gov. Daniel McKee said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
